title: Master Mutual TLS (mTLS) for gRPC
description: Implement zero-trust service-to-service communication using Mutual TLS (mTLS) for gRPC. Master client-certificate verification at the network layer to secure gRPC communication.
objectives: Implement zero-trust service-to-service communication using Mutual TLS (mTLS) for gRPC.
Master client-certificate verification at the network layer to secure gRPC communication.
